title: Arlong’s Teeth Become Weapons
description: On pages 13–16, arlong’s teeth become weapons focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.
scene: On pages 13–16, arlong’s teeth become weapons focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's chasing him all the way up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The left window on the top floor...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: These are all the maps that Nami spent 8 years drawing.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: For us fishmen, obtaining data about the sea is simple but using that data to draw maps is another matter.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Even if you search the whole world, you won't find someone who can draw maps as accurate as these...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: There is nothing more tragic than to waste those God-given talents that she possesses!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
